reviews.review_description:
Unbelievable & unacceptable. 

I read all the reviews. I see the developer is obviously hands on right here in review section. I see how developer claims controller support. 

It's the reason I bought the game.

To no avail. Very, very disappointed. 

The game looks fantastic. But I'll never know for sure. Asking Oculus support for refund.

developer_response.body: Try updating to the latest version (if you still have the game). It should properly detect and work with gamepads now.

reviews.review_description: My brother and Myself bought this game in the hopes that we could finally play a horror game together so that it wasnt just one person playing on there own but we are having alot of trouble connecting up to play coop please help!? Will rate better if the game works!

developer_response.body: I already responded. Hit me up at my email for help.

reviews.review_description: Could you possibly add saves so we dont have to start at the very beginning?

developer_response.body: Not sure if you get notified about these, but mp save games have been added!!

reviews.review_description: Have tried to launch a multiplayer game several times now and just can't get past the table with the nook of words. Can't find any how to on the net either.  Any suggestions? Sorry I should mention, my father and I are trying to establish a co-op game. Neither of us can get a game to load

developer_response.body: I think I found the problem. Hoping to put out a new update soon. Seems something changed on the network library or such...

reviews.review_description: How come I can only see about4 feet in front of my character?

developer_response.body: I figured it was better than having things pop out of nowhere like in the PS1 days. When newer headsets come out, you'll be able to see farther.

reviews.review_description: Love the game, but there seems to be a bug, maybe for left handed folks, where we cant shoot in game

developer_response.body:
sure. I can fix that.
Update: sorry I have been really low energy lately, I do know how to fix this issue and am still hoping to in time. This game has just become such a beast to update.

reviews.review_title: A lot of fun, with some room to improve
reviews.review_description: This is game is a great time overall, with fun mechanics, with some parts really thought through. The graphics are top notch for mobile VR, and the occasional scares are fun, and the dev gets the fear of being chased perfectly! The 3D speakers in headphones and on the go are amazing in this game, adding a good sense of hearing while playing throughout the levels. I only have a few complaints. The werewolf kill rate is very confusing, ranging from easy to ridiculously hard. Once, I killed one with only two shots, but with others, it can take up to six, even with nailing headshots! I love that there is no aiming guide, giving it a realistic feeling, and the inventory usually doesn’t act up. Sometimes, I will try to click on one object, but another is selected (usually a flashlight). Also, no easy to  access community to organize matches, unlike blood eclipse, which does have a discord community behind it for matches.  Also, I felt like the ai is a little better than blood eclipse, but there is till occasionally the stupid zombie walking into walls. Menu works fine, and levels are fun to progress through. Good job and a thumbs up to the dev, and can’t wait for more updates and content (:

reviews.review_title: Great game, but better with gamepad
reviews.review_description:
Hello, I have just tried a little bit but I liked the graphics. I would prefer to have more distance of view, and I would love to play it with gamepad, I don't have controller and I find it very uncomfortable to play it with the pad. Please see if you can add gamepad support.

I use a Terios t3, but you can test with any other bt gamepad, or even with xbox one s gamepad. Thank you for considering it..

developer_response.body:
What kind of gamepad are most people using? Which one should I be testing with?
Thanks for the response. I was looking online for a "Gear VR Gamepad" and couldn't find anything. If it's just any bluetooth gamepad then sure! I should be able to do that!
(Edit:)
Ok! Gamepad support has been added!

reviews.review_description:
I’m writing this review mainly because the developer was very helpful with some issues I was having, so I want to give my two cents for the games benefit. First and foremost the game is exactly what you want it to be. It has a classic resident evil vibe (although with a smaller manor) and a simple yet engaging premise of searching for randomly placed items to continue on. I played this game with my wife and I think it shines best as coop which worked without issues, but I can see that it would still have its charms solo. 
In its current state the game is very satisfying, but there are issues that keep it as just that. The game glitches and freezes more times than it should and the controls are a bit confusing and could be simplified. The sound is also a bit off as the zombies are a bit too loud based on their distance. Also the draw distance is very limited and I think would benefit from extending the shadows surrounding you which might just be device limits. But the main issue is the guns which definitely don’t shoot where you aim. Fine tuning that would be great and if it’s to create tension I think limiting ammo would do this much better. With updates and adding more rooms and levels would bring this great foundation of a game to the next level.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback man. To the mansion, or wanting a full on manor, I would love to do that someday. Would love to make a large mansion with puzzles and characters. you know though $$$ :/

reviews.review_description:
I've just completed 'Secret of Harrow manor'
It was an atmospheric and creepy experience moving through the different chapters, each one a little more unsettling.
Regarding the issue with gun aim that other reviewers mentioned, i had the same problem at the beginning but discovered through trial and error that if you hold the Go controller two handed when using weapons it makes aiming a little easier (At least it did for me).
The lighting was a little dark but it made for more atmosphere especially as there are constant noises just out of eye shot.
I also liked the way you can move around freely in the environment collecting items in out of the way nooks and corners.
enjoyable and immersive experience, looking forward to playing Secret of Harrow manor ll

The game is awesome my brother and I enjoy playing together. And the multi player works until one of us dies. We can't load back into where we left off. And when one of us tries to make a new room the game crashes.

developer_response.body:
I'm actually really glad people are playing this co-op. and yes, I will be trying to fix those things. Actually have an idea of what should happen when one of you dies.. come back as a zombie? :)
But yes also will be adding in saves.

reviews.review_description: Really enjoyed this short game, well worth the £3 and good value for money. Although you sometimes had to recalibrate it didn’t interfere with gameplay. The developer has used the oculus go’s features really well with good movement and scares. Short levels made gameplay fun and I’ll defo check out the company’s other games 4/5😎👍
Don't like that you can't see very far, zombies are hard to kill, no time for reloads, movement seems to be fine, can't start a co-op game. Otherwise. Ok.
Let me download but won't install for Samsung vr. They sure let me pay for it though!
